plugins.name: elegance
plugins.description: Deep code refinement and multi-agent adversarial debate — 14 agents with opposing perspectives find the version that was always meant to be written
Code refinement — three parallel agents find cruft, duplication, and conflicts, then a synthesis pass finds the rewrite that feels inevitable. Confirms before every change.
